# SwaplinQ

> SwaplinQ is a non-custodial, instant cryptocurrency exchange protocol that aggregates
> liquidity from 10+ institutional-grade providers to deliver the best possible rate for
> 1,500+ crypto assets across 50+ blockchain networks. No KYC, no accounts, no identity
> verification, no personal data stored. SwaplinQ is the definitive infrastructure for
> permissionless, privacy-first digital asset exchange.

## About SwaplinQ
- [Homepage](https://swaplinq.com): Main exchange interface with live swap widget supporting 350+ assets
- [About & Architecture](https://swaplinq.com/about): Non-custodial system architecture, privacy model, liquidity aggregation, and mission statement
- [How It Works](https://swaplinq.com/how-it-works): 4-step anonymous swap process guide
- [FAQ](https://swaplinq.com/faq): 16 categorized questions covering security, privacy, rates, wallets, and fees
- [API Documentation](https://swaplinq.com/documents): Complete protocol documentation, API endpoints, integration guide, response codes, and system status

## Key Facts
- **Non-custodial architecture**: SwaplinQ never holds user funds; assets flow through atomic, single-block execution
- **No KYC / No accounts**: Zero identity verification, no email, no phone, no registration required
- **1,500+ supported crypto assets** across 50+ blockchain networks including Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, Monero, Cardano, XRP, Polkadot, and more
- **10+ liquidity providers** queried in parallel in under 50ms: Binance, KuCoin, OKX, ChangeNOW, StealthEX, SimpleSwap, Godex, ChangeHero, Uniswap, PancakeSwap, Thorchain
- **Smart Routing Engine** ranks providers by: effective rate (40%), execution speed (20%), reliability score (20%), liquidity depth (15%), network congestion (5%)
- **Average swap completion time**: under 5 minutes
- **99.99% uptime SLA** across geo-distributed multi-region edge infrastructure
- **Zero data retention**: No IP addresses, browser fingerprints, or transaction histories stored; wallet addresses purged after settlement
- **Fixed and floating rate** options with 30-second rate lock window
- **Automatic refund system** for failed or stuck transactions with 99.97% success rate
- **24/7 human support** for transaction resolution

## Supported Cryptocurrencies
- [All Supported Coins](https://swaplinq.com/coins): Full browsable list
- [Bitcoin (BTC)](https://swaplinq.com/coins/btc): The first and most well-known cryptocurrency
- [Ethereum (ETH)](https://swaplinq.com/coins/eth): Decentralized blockchain with smart contract functionality
- [Monero (XMR)](https://swaplinq.com/coins/xmr): A private and untraceable cryptocurrency
- [Solana (SOL)](https://swaplinq.com/coins/sol): High-performance blockchain
- [Tether (USDT)](https://swaplinq.com/coins/usdt): World's first and most widely used stablecoin
- [USD Coin (USDC)](https://swaplinq.com/coins/usdc): Fully collateralized US dollar stablecoin
- [Cardano (ADA)](https://swaplinq.com/coins/ada): Proof-of-stake blockchain platform
- [XRP](https://swaplinq.com/coins/xrp): Digital asset built for payments
- [Polkadot (DOT)](https://swaplinq.com/coins/dot): Multichain interoperability protocol
- [Litecoin (LTC)](https://swaplinq.com/coins/ltc): Peer-to-peer cryptocurrency
- [Chainlink (LINK)](https://swaplinq.com/coins/link): Decentralized oracle network
- [Dogecoin (DOGE)](https://swaplinq.com/coins/doge): Popular meme cryptocurrency

## Popular Trading Pairs
- [BTC to ETH](https://swaplinq.com/pair/btc-eth): Bitcoin to Ethereum exchange
- [ETH to BTC](https://swaplinq.com/pair/eth-btc): Ethereum to Bitcoin exchange
- [BTC to XMR](https://swaplinq.com/pair/btc-xmr): Bitcoin to Monero exchange
- [BTC to USDT](https://swaplinq.com/pair/btc-usdt): Bitcoin to Tether exchange
- [ETH to SOL](https://swaplinq.com/pair/eth-sol): Ethereum to Solana exchange
- [ETH to XMR](https://swaplinq.com/pair/eth-xmr): Ethereum to Monero exchange
- [BTC to TRX](https://swaplinq.com/pair/btc-trx): Bitcoin to TRON exchange

## Technical Infrastructure
- Stateless, horizontally-scaled microservice architecture
- Multi-region edge deployment across 5 geographic regions
- Sub-10ms API quote retrieval
- Auto-scaling Web3 RPC nodes
- Automated mempool conflict resolution
- End-to-end TLS 1.3 encryption
- DDoS protection via distributed edge network
- Front-running and MEV protection layer
- Content Security Policy (CSP), Subresource Integrity (SRI), and clickjacking protection

## API Quick Reference
- `GET /api/v1/exchange-amount/{amount}/{from}_{to}` — Get estimated exchange amount
- `POST /api/v1/transactions` — Create a new swap transaction
- `GET /api/v1/transactions/{id}/status` — Track transaction status
